initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Central Arkansas
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective fostering food justice and community solidarity through direct action and food distribution across Central Arkansas. They coordinate free meal sharing, resource distribution, and solidarity networks while building power through anti-hunger initiatives and community care.

initiatives.name: The Pride Alliance
initiatives.description: Serving LGBTQIA* in North Central AR: Health & Wellness, Community Events, Support Groups, Resources, Training, Harm Reduction, Youth Services.

initiatives.name: Central Arkansas Pride
initiatives.description: 501c3 Nonprofit LGBTQIA+ PRIDE organization established in 2013. Our mission is to educate, unite, and inspire through events that serve the LGBTQIA+ community and our allies.

initiatives.name: Central Arkansas Harm Reduction
initiatives.description: For those who use drvgs & those impacted by the War on Drvgs
